use_cases: Display animated shader art on landing pages and portfolio sites
Render dynamic 3D raymarched visuals as background effects
Showcase algorithmic art with smooth trigonometric color transitions
Provide self-contained WebGL2 canvas rendering for creative web applications
ai_summary: A WebGL2 shader component rendering dynamic, time-animated visuals using raymarching techniques with cosine-based coloring and matrix transformations. The shader performs iterative ray stepping through a procedural 3D scene, applying trigonometric modulation and rotation matrices to create abstract flowing forms. It uses standard uniforms for resolution and time, rendering to a fullscreen canvas as a self-contained visual effect component.
